abada.name: Abāda
abada.author: Maodo (Seydi El Hadji Malick Sy)
abada.description: One of Maodo's major spiritual compositions, rich in mystical poetry and Islamic teachings.

first_verse.translation_fr: L'éternité éclair sous le voile de l'obscurité
first_verse.translation_en: Eternally lightning beneath the veil of darkness

khilass-zahab.name: Khilās-Zahab
khilass-zahab.author: Maodo (Seydi El Hadji Malick Sy)
khilass-zahab.note: Khilās-Zahab is embedded as one of multiple xassidas in the main xassidas.json file
khilass-zahab.description: A foundational text in the Tidjiane tradition, focusing on purification of the soul and devotion.

first_verse.translation_fr: Au nom d'Allah, le Tout Miséricordieux, le Très Miséricordieux.
first_verse.translation_en: In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.

abouna.name: Abouna
abouna.author: Serigne Cheikh (Al Hajj Malik Sy's Teacher)
abouna.note: ⚠️ IMPORTANT: This xassida is by Serigne Cheikh, not Maodo. It is included as it's a foundational text in the Tidjiane tradition.
abouna.description: A devotional poem honoring the spiritual guide (shaykh) Abu Bakr. Part of foundational Tidjiane teachings.

first_verse.arabic: أَبُونَا أَبُوبَكْرٍ وَإِنْ كَانَ فِي الْقَبْرِ
first_verse.transcription: abūnā abūbakrin wa'in kāna fī l-qabri
first_verse.note: Translations not available in original source

method_1_raw_github.description: Download raw JSON files directly from GitHub
steps: Access the raw GitHub URLs listed under each xassida

method_2_repository_clone.description: Clone entire repository for all xassidas

method_3_use_provided.description: Use the extracted JSON files provided in this folder
method_3_use_provided.note: Once they are created, copy them to src/data/ directory

verse_structure.number: Verse number within chapter (0-indexed for intro/basmalah)
verse_structure.text: Full Arabic text with diacritical marks (tashkīl)

chapter_structure.name: Chapter name in Arabic
chapter_structure.translated_names: Translations of chapter name if available

quick_start: 3. Create importedXassidas.ts to export xassida data
4. Update QassidasScreen.tsx to use imported data
5. Test with console.log to verify data structure
full_integration: 2. Add search functionality for imported xassidas
3. Create migration layer from old to new data
4. Add unit tests for data integrity
5. Create migration guide for existing users

verification_checklist: ✅ All Arabic text has proper diacritics

maodo.role: Founder of Tidjiane branch in West Africa
maodo.legacy: Prolific poet and spiritual leader; Abāda and Khilās-Zahab are among his most studied works

serigne_cheikh.role: Spiritual teacher and guide; teacher of Maodo tradition
